skills.name: msdmd
skills.description: Module Self-Declared Metadata in Markdown — foundational convention for declaring structured metadata in fenced comment blocks inside the code that owns it.

skills.name: doc-build
skills.description: DOCS coverage. Modules declare # === DOCS === blocks; runner verifies paths, anchors, freshness.

skills.name: cap-build
skills.description: CAPABILITIES inventory. Modules declare # === CAPABILITIES === blocks; runner builds a capability map and checks exposed surfaces.

skills.name: test-build
skills.description: CONTRACTS runner. Modules declare # === CONTRACTS === blocks; runner imports each call: path and executes.

skills.name: meta-module-build
skills.description: MODULE_BUILD manifests. Manifest-first scaffolding: intent → manifest → file plan → tests → scaffold → reviewable change.

skills.name: risk-boundary-build
skills.description: BOUNDARIES declarations. Modules declare # === BOUNDARIES === blocks for auth/storage/network/user_data/admin_only effects.

skills.name: ratios
skills.description: RATIOS bookend at top and bottom of each file. Runner recomputes loc_comments, imports_exports, calls_definitions and fails on drift.

skills.name: canon
skills.description: Source-backed canon vs proposed canon vs hmmm doctrine. Protects the boundary between actual canon and inferred agent claims.

skills.name: visitor-intro
skills.description: Onboarding tour for newcomers landing at any The-Interdependency repo.

skills.name: manifest
skills.description: Living-spec generator. Splices the factual half of CLAUDE.md from pyproject.toml + tree. CI --check drift gate.

skills.name: char-compress
skills.description: Bone/flesh char-compression for agent handoff and SKILL.md authorship. Flesh dense, bone sparse; carry hmmm; preserve negation, quantifiers, order, operators, statuses, secrets.
